query:
You are a product analyst building a feature comparison matrix. The subject is the subject company (). Compare it against the 10 competitors below.

Competitors:
  1. name="Nalo", website="https://nalo.fr"
  2. name="Linxo", website="https://linxo.com"
  3. name="Grisbee", website="https://grisbee.com"
  4. name="Horiz.io", website="https://horiz.io"
  5. name="Sharesight", website="https://sharesight.com"
  6. name="InvMon", website="https://invmon.com"
  7. name="Wealthfolio", website="https://ealthfolio.app"
  8. name="Quicken", website="https://quicken.com"
  9. name="Merlin", website="https://merlin.com"
  10. name="Sure", website="https://sure.com"

STEP 1 — Identify 6 to 10 KEY FEATURES that matter when comparing these products. Group them by category (Core / Pricing / Integrations / Enterprise / Mobile). Return as 'features' array with {label, group}. The SAME features list must be used to score every competitor — choose features that are meaningful for all.

STEP 2 — For EACH competitor, return a 'capabilities' array with one entry per feature defined in step 1. Each entry: {feature: '<exact label>', value: '<one of full/part/none/soon>'}. 'full' = covered with a dedicated feature. 'part' = partial / limited coverage. 'none' = not supported. 'soon' = on public roadmap.

STEP 3 — For EACH competitor, also return notable_customers: 3-5 publicly known customers with {name, domain, segment (Grand compte/ETI/PME/Startup/Consumer), industry, evidence (case study URL or quote)}.

Omit any capability you cannot verify — do NOT guess. Return one competitor object per company in the SAME order as the input list. Preserve company names EXACTLY.
answer:
{"executive_summary": "- **Aggregation Dominance**: Linxo (1,700+ institutions) and Grisbee (200+ via Powens) lead bank account aggregation, while 6 of 10 competitors offer none - revealing a clear split between open-banking-native and investment-only platforms.
- **Tax Reporting Niche**: Only Sharesight and Quicken deliver full dedicated tax reporting; most French platforms offer partial fiscal simulators instead, creating a gap for cross-border investors.
- **Automated Investing Scarcity**: Nalo is the sole platform with full automated/robo-advisory investing; Grisbee offers part (human-assisted); the remaining 8 offer none, highlighting that most tools are tracking-first, not execution-first.
- **Free Tier Prevalence**: 6 of 10 competitors offer a free tier, but depth varies wildly - from Wealthfolio's fully free open-source model to InvMon's 12-position limit. Quicken, Nalo, and Horiz.io have no free access.
- **Enterprise Bifurcation**: Only Linxo Connect and Sharesight Business offer full API/white-label B2B platforms; Merlin and Horiz.io have partial professional tiers; the rest are purely consumer.
- **Mobile Gap in Desktop-First Tools**: InvMon and Sure have no mobile app; Wealthfolio has iOS only (Android planned); Sharesight has iOS only (Android via PWA) - desktop-first architectures still dominate investment tools.

---", "step_1_key_features": "| # | Label | Group | Rationale |
|---|-------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | Portfolio Tracking | Core | Universal need: all 10 platforms track some form of investment or asset holdings |
| 2 | Bank Account Aggregation | Core | Key differentiator between open-banking platforms and standalone trackers |
| 3 | Tax Reporting | Core | Critical for investors with real capital-gains/dividend obligations |
| 4 | Automated Investing | Core | Separates robo-advisors (execution) from trackers (observation only) |
| 5 | Free Tier | Pricing | Adoption driver; reveals monetization philosophy (freemium vs. paid-only vs. open-source) |
| 6 | Broker Integrations | Integrations | Direct broker/bank API connections enable automated data flow |
| 7 | API / White-Label | Enterprise | B2B capability for institutions to embed or resell the platform |
| 8 | Mobile App | Mobile | On-the-go access; native vs. PWA vs. none reveals platform maturity |

---", "step_2_capability_scoring": "### Detailed Scoring Table

| Feature | Nalo | Linxo | Grisbee | Horiz.io | Sharesight | InvMon | Wealthfolio | Quicken | Merlin | Sure |
|---------|------|-------|---------|----------|------------|--------|-------------|---------|--------|------|
| Portfolio Tracking | full | full | full | part | full | full | full | full | full | full |
| Bank Account Aggregation | none | full | full | none | none | none | none | full | none | part |
| Tax Reporting | part | part | part | part | full | none | none | full | none | none |
| Automated Investing | full | none | part | none | none | none | none | none | none | none |
| Free Tier | none | full | full | none | full | full | full | none | full | full |
| Broker Integrations | none | full | full | none | full | part | none | full | part | none |
| API / White-Label | none | full | none | part | full | none | none | none | part | part |
| Mobile App | full | full | full | none | part | none | part | full | full | none |

Key takeaways from the matrix: No single platform scores "full" across all 8 features. Linxo and Quicken lead with 6 "full" scores each, but Linxo lacks Automated Investing while Quicken lacks Free Tier and API/White-Label. The deepest specialization gap is Automated Investing, where only Nalo scores "full."

---

### Per-Competitor Capability Justification

**Nalo** (nalo.fr) - French robo-advisor for assurance-vie and PER:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Tracks assurance-vie, PER, ETFs, SCPIs, euro funds with personalized dashboard [nalo.fr]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **none** - Closed ecosystem; no external bank account sync [nalo.fr]
- Tax Reporting: **part** - Highlights "fiscalite allegee" benefits of assurance-vie/PER envelopes; no dedicated capital-gains tax report generator [nalo.fr]
- Automated Investing: **full** - Core robo-advisor feature with delegated management, "Securisation progressive" auto-de-risking, and "Technologie Multiprojets" multi-goal allocation [nalo.fr]
- Free Tier: **none** - AUM-based management fees; minimum investment of EUR 500 (Flex) / EUR 1,000 (Patrimoine) [nalo.fr]
- Broker Integrations: **none** - Products underwritten exclusively by partners Generali and Apicil; no third-party broker connections [nalo.fr]
- API / White-Label: **none** - Consumer-only platform; no public API or B2B offering [nalo.fr]
- Mobile App: **full** - "100% digital" experience across computer and mobile; Google rating 4.7/5 from 850+ reviews [nalo.fr]

**Linxo** (linxo.com) - Open banking and personal finance platform:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Wealth product aggregates holdings by asset class (PEA, savings, crypto) [linxo.com]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **full** - Core feature; connects to 1,700+ financial institutions via PSD2 open banking [linxo.com, Grokipedia]
- Tax Reporting: **part** - API endpoints for financial reports (JSON/PDF), but not a dedicated consumer tax-filing tool [developers.linxo.com]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Data infrastructure and payments provider; no advisory or execution [linxo.com]
- Free Tier: **full** - Linxo Lab consumer app is free for budget and savings management [linxo.com]
- Broker Integrations: **full** - 1,700+ institutions connected via open banking APIs [linxo.com]
- API / White-Label: **full** - Linxo Connect: full B2B API suite (Accounts, Payments, Widgets, Data Enrichment) for financial institutions [developers.linxo.com, linxo.com]
- Mobile App: **full** - iOS and Android consumer apps available [linxo.com, Google Play]

**Grisbee** (grisbee.fr) - Digital wealth management and aggregation:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Tracks all asset types: current accounts, savings, real estate, stocks, crypto, alternative investments with projection engine [grisbee.fr, Tracxn]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **full** - 200+ institutions connected via Budget Insight/Powens technology; automatic sync, semi-auto valuation, manual entry [grisbee.fr/agregation-patrimoine]
- Tax Reporting: **part** - Fiscal simulators for income tax, IFI, inheritance, CDHR; "Defiscalisator" tool; but not a full tax-filing solution [grisbee.fr]
- Automated Investing: **part** - Human dedicated advisors execute investment strategies; not fully automated robo-advisory [grisbee.fr]
- Free Tier: **full** - Aggregation tool and simulators are free; monetization via advisory and product placement [grisbee.fr]
- Broker Integrations: **full** - 200+ institutions including Credit Agricole, BNP Paribas, Societe Generale, Boursorama, Fortuneo, Linxea [grisbee.fr/agregation-patrimoine]
- API / White-Label: **none** - No public API or white-label documented [grisbee.fr]
- Mobile App: **full** - Available on App Store and Google Play [grisbee.fr, Google Play]

**Horiz.io** (horiz.io) - Real estate investment and rental management:
- Portfolio Tracking: **part** - Real estate portfolio tracking only; not multi-asset class (no stocks, crypto, etc.) [horiz.io]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **none** - Real estate focused; no bank account sync [horiz.io]
- Tax Reporting: **part** - Tax declaration assistance for rental income; fiscal simulation for furnished/unfurnished/SCI regimes [horiz.io/offres]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Property search and analysis tool, not automated investing [horiz.io]
- Free Tier: **none** - Core platform requires subscription (EUR 19.99/month or EUR 8.25/month annual) [horiz.io/offres]
- Broker Integrations: **none** - Not applicable; real estate platform [horiz.io]
- API / White-Label: **part** - Horiz PRO tier for real estate agencies/professionals; dedicated agency portal [horiz.io]
- Mobile App: **none** - Web-based platform only; no native iOS/Android app documented [horiz.io]

**Sharesight** (sharesight.com) - Stock portfolio tracker with tax reporting:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Tracks stocks, ETFs, managed funds, cash, currencies, unlisted investments, and investment properties across 40+ exchanges [sharesight.com]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **none** - Investment tracking platform; does not aggregate bank accounts [sharesight.com]
- Tax Reporting: **full** - Award-winning tax reporting: capital gains, dividend tracking, tax-year reports, multi-jurisdiction support [sharesight.com]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Tracking and reporting only; no execution [sharesight.com]
- Free Tier: **full** - Free plan: 1 portfolio, 10 holdings [sharesight.com/pricing]
- Broker Integrations: **full** - Integrates with hundreds of brokers including Robinhood, Charles Schwab, Interactive Brokers [sharesight.com]
- API / White-Label: **full** - Partner API and "For Business" plan for financial advisors, family offices, accounting firms [sharesight.com/become-a-partner]
- Mobile App: **part** - Native iOS app available on App Store; Android users must use PWA/home-screen shortcut, no native Android app [help.sharesight.com, App Store]

**InvMon** (invmon.com) - Desktop investment monitoring for private investors:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Dedicated portfolio view, structured portfolios, rebalancing tools, watchlists, hedging targets, simulated vs. actual performance comparison [invmon.com/portfolio-management]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **none** - Desktop application; no bank account aggregation [invmon.com]
- Tax Reporting: **none** - Not mentioned in any available source [invmon.com]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Monitoring and analysis tool only [invmon.com]
- Free Tier: **full** - Free plan ($0 forever): 1 broker account, 12 positions [invmon.com/plans]
- Broker Integrations: **part** - Interactive Brokers connectivity only [invmon.com]
- API / White-Label: **none** - Single-user desktop application; no API [invmon.com]
- Mobile App: **none** - macOS desktop application only; no iOS/Android app [invmon.com]

**Wealthfolio** (wealthfolio.app) - Open-source, offline, private portfolio tracker:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Tracks investments, net worth, spending, dividends, interest income, asset allocation, sector/geographic exposure, benchmarks against S&P 500 or any ETF [wealthfolio.app/features]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **none** - Local data storage; manual CSV import only; no automatic bank sync [wealthfolio.app, GitHub]
- Tax Reporting: **none** - Not mentioned in any available source [wealthfolio.app]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Tracking and simulation only [wealthfolio.app]
- Free Tier: **full** - Open source, no subscription, free forever [wealthfolio.app, App Store description]
- Broker Integrations: **none** - No direct broker API connections; manual statement import [wealthfolio.app]
- API / White-Label: **none** - Open-source desktop app; no formal API or white-label [wealthfolio.app]
- Mobile App: **part** - Native iOS app available on App Store ("Wealthfolio: Private Finance"); Android version planned but not yet built; PWA available for self-hosted users [wealthfolio.app/docs/guide/mobile, App Store]

**Quicken** (quicken.com) - Personal finance management software:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Investment dashboard with holdings, balances, performance across accounts; TWR and IRR metrics; custom news feed based on holdings [quicken.com/features/optimize-your-investments]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **full** - Connects to financial institutions for automatic transaction download and account sync [quicken.com]
- Tax Reporting: **full** - Tax reports, Schedule D, capital gains reports, tax-year summaries [quicken.com]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Tracking and planning only; no automated execution [quicken.com]
- Free Tier: **none** - All plans are paid, starting at $3.99/month (billed annually) [quicken.com/products/pricing-comparison]
- Broker Integrations: **full** - Connects to multiple brokerages and financial institutions [quicken.com]
- API / White-Label: **none** - Consumer product; no public API or B2B offering [quicken.com]
- Mobile App: **full** - iOS and Android apps available [quicken.com]

**Merlin** (merlininvestor.com) - WealthTech platform for investors and banks:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Multi-asset portfolio creation, rebalancing, customizable dashboard; explorers for stocks, crypto, NFTs; widgets for asset allocation, risk rate, strategy backtest [merlininvestor.com]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **none** - Portfolio import feature but not automatic bank account aggregation [merlininvestor.com]
- Tax Reporting: **none** - Not mentioned in any available source [merlininvestor.com]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Analysis and tracking platform; no automated execution [merlininvestor.com]
- Free Tier: **full** - "Camelot" plan: free forever, 2 portfolios, 10 assets per portfolio, customizable dashboard, community chat [merlininvestor.com/subscriptions]
- Broker Integrations: **part** - Implied through "Portfolio Import" and "Assets by Custodian" widgets; no specific named broker integrations documented [merlininvestor.com]
- API / White-Label: **part** - Dedicated "Banks and Financial Institutions" B2B outreach; CTO oversees "API integrations"; multi-cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure); but no formal white-label product details published [merlininvestor.com/company]
- Mobile App: **full** - iOS App Store (bundle ID 1638350124) and Google Play (com.merlininvestor) [merlininvestor.com]

**Sure** (sure.am) - Open-source personal finance app:
- Portfolio Tracking: **full** - Track investments, stocks, crypto, net worth, properties, debts [sure.am]
- Bank Account Aggregation: **part** - Can add and track bank accounts, stocks, crypto, and properties; not full automatic aggregation from institutions [sure.am]
- Tax Reporting: **none** - Not mentioned in any available source [sure.am]
- Automated Investing: **none** - Tracking and AI assistant only [sure.am]
- Free Tier: **full** - Open source, free, self-hostable via Docker; hosted demo with sample data [sure.am, GitHub]
- Broker Integrations: **none** - No direct broker API connections documented [sure.am, GitHub]
- API / White-Label: **part** - Open source and self-hostable; can be forked and customized; but no formal white-label program [GitHub we-promise/sure]
- Mobile App: **none** - Web-based application; no native iOS or Android app [sure.am]

---", "step_3_notable_customers": "| Competitor | Customer | Domain | Segment | Industry | Evidence |
|------------|----------|--------|---------|----------|----------|
| **Nalo** | Generali | generali.com | Grand compte | Insurance | Underwrites Nalo Patrimoine assurance-vie contracts; described as "3rd largest European insurer" on nalo.fr |
| **Nalo** | Apicil | apicil.fr | Grand compte | Social Protection | Parent group since 2023; described as "3rd largest French social protection group" on nalo.fr |
| **Nalo** | 22,000+ retail investors | nalo.fr | Consumer | Wealth Management | EUR 600M AUM as of Dec 31, 2025; 4.7/5 Google rating from 850+ reviews per nalo.fr |
| **Linxo** | Credit Agricole | credit-agricole.com | Grand compte | Banking | Parent company/acquirer; uses Linxo Connect for open banking infrastructure per multiple sources |
| **Linxo** | 1,700+ connected financial institutions | linxo.com | Grand compte/ETI | Banking/Fintech | Institutions aggregated via Linxo Connect API per linxo.com and developers.linxo.com |
| **Grisbee** | Budget Insight / Powens | powens.com | ETI | Fintech/Open Banking | Technology provider for Grisbee's account aggregation per grisbee.fr/agregation-patrimoine |
| **Grisbee** | 180,000+ retail users | grisbee.fr | Consumer | Wealth Management | 4.8/5 Google rating; 180K+ users per grisbee.fr |
| **Sharesight** | 500,000+ investors | sharesight.com | Consumer | Investment Tracking | "Over 500,000+ investors track their investments" per sharesight.com |
| **Sharesight** | Financial advisors and accounting firms | sharesight.com | PME/ETI | Financial Advisory | Partner API and For Business plan per sharesight.com/become-a-partner |
| **Wealthfolio** | Open-source community | github.com/wealthfolio/wealthfolio | Startup/Consumer | Developer Tools | Active GitHub repository with open-source contributors per GitHub |
| **Quicken** | Millions of retail users | quicken.com | Consumer | Personal Finance | Four paid plans from $3.99/mo; 51-200 employees per LinkedIn |
| **Merlin** | Banks and Financial Institutions (unnamed) | merlininvestor.com | Grand compte | Banking/WealthTech | Dedicated B2B outreach section for banks per merlininvestor.com |
| **Sure** | Open-source community (8.6K GitHub stars) | github.com/we-promise/sure | Startup/Consumer | Developer Tools | Community fork of Maybe; 8.6K stars, 146 forks per GitHub |

Note: Horiz.io and InvMon have no publicly verifiable named customers. Customer information for most competitors in this space is limited because the majority serve consumers directly rather than enterprises, and individual consumer names are not publicly disclosed.

---", "synthesis_cross_cutting_insights": "Three distinct platform archetypes emerge from the comparison:

1. **Open-Banking Aggregators** (Linxo, Grisbee) - Built on PSD2/regulatory data access; strong in aggregation and integrations; weak in automated investing and execution. Their value comes from data liquidity rather than financial advice.

2. **Investment-Only Trackers** (Sharesight, InvMon, Wealthfolio, Merlin) - Focus on portfolio analytics, performance measurement, and asset allocation; sacrifice bank aggregation and automated investing for depth in tracking. Sharesight stands out with full tax reporting, a gap in all others in this group.

3. **Full-Stack Financial Platforms** (Nalo, Quicken) - Combine tracking with either execution (Nalo's robo-advisory) or budgeting (Quicken's cash-flow management); but neither offers API/white-label, limiting enterprise applicability.

The two niche players - Horiz.io (real estate only) and Sure (open-source self-hosted) - occupy extreme positions: Horiz.io is the only platform with dedicated real estate portfolio management, while Sure is the only fully self-hostable option, trading convenience for privacy and control.

The most critical feature gap across the entire landscape is the intersection of Tax Reporting and Automated Investing: no single platform delivers both at "full" capability. Nalo automates investing but has only partial tax tools; Sharesight has full tax reporting but no execution. This represents a clear product opportunity for a platform that bridges advisory execution with comprehensive fiscal compliance.

---"}
